Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of William O. Johnson is Off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/EHG

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
Defendant William O. Johnson was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 26, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A., and against defendant Wiliam O. Johnson as follows:

Principal - $7,922.31.
Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $250.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $8,172.31.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Set For Trial On Dec-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
